narrative:
North Olmsted-02-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 882 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.3 percentage points.
